action_set_definitions.name: get_system_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current operational parameters of the reactor environment, including temperature, pressure, flow rate, rod insertion, power output, and safety status.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_coolant_flow
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the flow rate of the primary coolant system. Note: Mechanical constraints limit the safe maximum flow.

flow_rate_m3_s.description: Target coolant flow rate in cubic meters per second.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_control_rod_insertion
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the insertion depth of the control rods to manage reactor reactivity, temperature, and power output.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_containment_pressure_system
action_set_definitions.description: Activates or deactivates the auxiliary containment cooling and pressure suppression systems.

operation.description: The command to stabilize containment pressure.

state_description.core_temperature_celsius: Current temperature of the reactor core in degrees Celsius.
state_description.containment_pressure_mpa: Internal pressure within the containment vessel in Megapascals.
state_description.coolant_flow_rate: The rate at which coolant is being pumped through the system in cubic meters per second.
state_description.control_rod_insertion_percent: The percentage of control rod insertion (0 = fully retracted/max reactivity, 100 = fully inserted/min reactivity).
state_description.power_output_mw: Current electrical power output in Megawatts.
state_description.radiation_level_msv_h: Ambient radiation levels within the containment area in millisieverts per hour.
